calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Directing Trustee To Make Distributions To Beneficiary And Objections To Account
Off Calendar Jan-24-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sheila Robello for Anthony Alioto (Trustee).
Richard Rapoport for Maria Manalo.
Erika Yuen for Nunzio Aliota and Jennifer Alioto Oliver.

This matter was consolidated on December 7, 2016. All future pleadings are to be filed in the lead case number: PTR-14-298002. This petition is being added to and will be heard in the lead case. Ms. Robello reported that some minor issues (insurance and appraisal fee) were resolved, and that the issues of whether there would be a waiver of accounting, what is the standard of living and what is the scope of the Trustee's discretion could go to mediation. The Parties agreed to participate in mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than March 27, 2017. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by March 29, 2017. The Petition for Order Directing Trustee to Make Distributions to Beneficiary and Objections to Account was continued to and the Parties are to return on April 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: L. Maloney. Not reported.
